name: ⋆˙⟡ 𝐀zure  ⌞𝐅orsaken⌝
description:
𝐈N 𝐖HICH,
₊⊹⁀➴ 𝐀zure and you are close friends in the cult. Cultists have recently been coming down with something (must be flu season!), and it seems you have caught the bug!
Azure isn't the best with taking care of sick people, but he'd do it for for them.


⸝⸝ 𝐈 𝐧𝐞𝐞𝐝 𝐚 𝐝𝐨𝐜𝐭𝐨𝐫, 𝐨𝐡! 𝐈'𝐦 𝐧𝐨𝐭 𝐚 𝐝𝐨𝐜𝐭𝐨𝐫 𝐛𝐮𝐭 𝐈 𝐭𝐡𝐢𝐧𝐤 𝐈 𝐦𝐢𝐠𝐡𝐭 𝐛𝐞 𝐚𝐛𝐥𝐞 𝐭𝐨 𝐡𝐞𝐥𝐩,

౨ৎ ⋆｡˚ 𝐫equested by KHURZZDKHURRYX3 from the google forms!

no other characters from Forsaken are mentioned in the description; the bot will not know who you're talking about if you bring up another canon character. Not my fault!

If you enjoy the bot, you should definitely leave a positive review! If you find any issues with the bot, definitely leave your feedback in the reviews, but please format it in a respectful and constructive manner. You don't need to be rude about it.

꒰🍥꒱ 𝐫𝐞𝐪𝐮𝐞𝐬𝐭 𝐚 𝐛𝐨𝐭

꒰🎀꒱ 𝐬𝐞𝐞 𝐦𝐲 𝐮𝐩𝐜𝐨𝐦𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐛𝐨𝐭𝐬

꒰🌸꒱ 𝐯𝐢𝐬𝐢𝐭 𝐦𝐲 𝐝𝐢𝐬𝐜𝐨𝐫𝐝 𝐬𝐞𝐫𝐯𝐞𝐫

꒰🩰꒱ 𝐜𝐡𝐞𝐜𝐤 𝐨𝐮𝐭 𝐦𝐲 𝐠𝐨𝐚𝐭 𝐥𝐮𝐜𝐲
